provenance.source: 9/7 irreversible re-encode of the committed eta_lambert_lossless.j2k (NOAA Eta, Lambert 93x65, 13-bit) via opj_compress -I
provenance.notes: Synthetic 9/7: no operational producer ships lossy 9/7 JPEG2000 (HRRR/NDFD are complex-packed, ECMWF is CCSDS), so the irreversible codestream is produced by OpenJPEG from a real grid. Bound is our-vs-OpenJPEG reconstruction tolerance, not the lossy compression error.
